title: Wave 2: archive 7 satellite venture venture-summary.json instances
description: Per D7 (2026-05-17) venture-summary.json was deprecated portfolio-wide; schema retained as canonical contract. EB instance was archived in PR #47. This deliverable archives the remaining 7 satellite ventures' venture-summary.json instances using the archive directory infrastructure from sibling Wave 2 deliverable. Each archival writes an archive-manifest entry per the archive-manifest.schema.json from sibling. No data loss — instances move to archive with full audit metadata.

outputs.description: Pre-work: enumerate the 7 satellite ventures with active venture-summary.json instances. Confirm each is safe-to-archive (no live consumer reads). Erik confirmed safe in prior session; verify per-instance via grep across portfolio.
acceptanceCriteria: 7 satellite ventures identified (excluding EB already archived in PR #47)
Per-venture safe-to-archive grep confirms no live reads
Report posted to chat for confirmation before archival

outputs.description: For each of 7 ventures: move venture-summary.json to schemas/_archive/venture-summary/<venture>/ and add archive-manifest.json entry per archive-manifest.schema.json. Each move is one commit (7 commits total in single PR).
acceptanceCriteria: refs rebuild --check exit 0 (archive in refsignore so no registry change)

preMerge: ajv-cli@5 validates this DELIVERABLE.json instance against deliverable.schema.json v1.0.0
Sibling d-2026-06-03 at S7-merged (archive infrastructure must exist)
postMerge: Schema-registry main has no active venture-summary.json instances outside _archive/
All 7 venture-summary moves auditable via archive-manifest entries

transitions.trigger: Wave 2 child spec authored alongside parent and siblings

notes: Blocked-by d-2026-06-03 (needs archive infrastructure). 7 venture moves in one PR; one commit per venture for clean revert if needed. EB already archived in PR #47 (2026-05-17); not in this scope. Single-repo (schema-registry) since the venture-summary instances live there as snapshots, not in venture repos.
